summary: Completed backend and frontend testing for MVPLine - Auth flow, Tasks CRUD, Forgot Password, and Tab Navigation. Backend APIs all pass (17/17 tests). Frontend has partial functionality - Login, Signup, Tab Navigation work. Forgot Password flow has Alert.alert web compatibility issue.

minor.issue: Was missing 'priority' field - FIXED by adding priority to Task and TaskCreate models in models.py

ui_bugs.issue: Alert.alert callback doesn't work on web - page doesn't transition from email step to code step after API success
Forgot Password? link click doesn't navigate to /auth/forgot-password (requires direct URL or page refresh)
Task creation form filled but Success alert doesn't show (Alert.alert web issue), tasks not appearing in list

integration_issues.issue: React Native Alert.alert() callbacks don't fire on web, preventing step transitions

issues: Good dark theme implementation, proper contrast

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Alert.alert web compatibility in forgot-password.tsx - use platform-specific code or window.alert fallback for web
Fix Task creation flow - Alert.alert callback issue prevents navigation after task create
Consider using @expo/alert or custom modal for cross-platform alert compatibility
Verify Forgot Password link navigation from login page works (expo-router issue)
critical_code_review_comments: Alert.alert() from React Native doesn't work properly on web - callbacks don't fire. Use Platform.OS check and window.confirm/alert for web
The forgot-password step transition depends on Alert callback at line 49 - this breaks on web
Task model was missing priority field which is used in frontend - now fixed
updated_files: /app/backend/models.py - Added priority field to Task and TaskCreate models

success_rate.frontend: 70% (Login, Signup, Navigation work; Forgot Password, Task Create Alert callbacks fail on web)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully working. Main frontend issue is Alert.alert() callbacks not working on web platform. Fix requires Platform.OS check and web fallback. Test on native mobile for full functionality.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: React Native's Alert.alert() relies on native bridges which don't exist on web. The polyfill for web doesn't properly handle callbacks (onPress). The Forgot Password flow and Task creation both use Alert.alert with callbacks to trigger state changes (setStep, navigation). On web, these callbacks never fire, leaving users stuck. Solution: Use Platform.OS === 'web' check and window.alert or custom modal for web.

mocked_api.noted: Twilio SMS/Voice, OpenAI AI suggestions, and Email for password reset are MOCKED - dev_code returned in API response
